author: Andrew Mouldon
name: BankLinear — Compositional Weight Sharing Across Depth
blurb: BankLinear composes per-layer QKV projection weights from a shared bank of learned basis matrices using depth-aware global mixing and channel-wise modulation. Directly builds on the initial naive baseline and is trained for a fixed 10k steps. Reuses projection parameters across depth and reinvests saved capacity into a larger MLP.
